description: Sync module — GovtImporterService, Playwright portal-inspection scratch scripts, env configs, sync/integration tests

nodes.label: GovtImporterService
nodes.description: Imports government beneficiary data from CSV uploads into DB with SHA-256 change detection, per-row change logging, deactivation tracking
nodes.tooltip: Core service: importBeneficiaries, markDeactivatedBeneficiaries, computeRowHash, mapCategory

nodes.label: GovtBeneficiaryRow
nodes.description: Interface for raw government beneficiary row data from CSV (ration card, family, LPG/PNG status, address)
nodes.tooltip: 13 fields: srNo, cardHolderName, hofAsPerNFSA, rationCardNo, cardCategory, familyMember, lpgStatus, pngStatus, address, village

nodes.label: ImportResult
nodes.description: Result object returned from importBeneficiaries — counts new, updated, unchanged, deleted, errors
nodes.tooltip: batchId + 6 counters

nodes.label: test-argon.cjs
nodes.description: ESM test script (await top-level) verifying argon2id hash for password 'Dealer@123'
nodes.tooltip: Argon2 verification test — ESM

nodes.label: test-argon.js
nodes.description: CJS test script verifying argon2id hash for password 'Dealer@123' using .then pattern
nodes.tooltip: Argon2 verification test — CJS

nodes.label: inspect-captcha.js
nodes.description: Playwright script that navigates to eFPS portal login, screenshots captcha image, runs Tesseract OCR to extract text
nodes.tooltip: OCR-based captcha solver test — playwright + tesseract.js

nodes.label: inspect-ipds.js
nodes.description: Comprehensive Playwright reconnaissance of IPDS Gujarat Social Audit portal — dumps elements, ASP.NET WebForms state, dropdowns, table structures, login form detection
nodes.tooltip: IPDS portal inspection — ASP.NET WebForms recon

nodes.label: inspect-portal.js
nodes.description: Simple Playwright inspection of eFPS login page — dumps form HTML and interactive elements
nodes.tooltip: eFPS portal login page inspection

nodes.label: inspect-post-login.js
nodes.description: Full post-login Playwright inspection — logs into eFPS via OCR captcha, then inspects beneficiaries, transactions, stock, dashboard pages with element/table/ASP.NET state dumps
nodes.tooltip: Post-login eFPS portal inspection — screenshots + element dump

nodes.label: .env.example
nodes.description: Environment variable template with placeholder values for all config sections: app, DB, Redis, JWT, encryption, sync, OTP/SMS, security, R2 storage, monitoring
nodes.tooltip: Template env file — all sections with comments

nodes.label: .env.test
nodes.description: Test environment overrides — port 0, test DB on port 5433, mock SMS provider, silent logging
nodes.tooltip: Test env — NODE_ENV=test, mock provider, LOG_LEVEL=silent

nodes.label: .env (dev)
nodes.description: Active development environment — port 3000, postgres on 5434, msg91 SMS, MOCK_GOVT_PORTAL=true
nodes.tooltip: Dev env — active configuration

nodes.label: test setup.ts
nodes.description: Test bootstrap — loads .env.test via dotenv, suppresses Redis version < 6.2.0 warnings
nodes.tooltip: Vitest setup — env loading + warning suppression

nodes.label: test factories.ts
nodes.description: Test data factories: createTestDealer (argon2 hash), createTestBeneficiary, createTestTransaction
nodes.tooltip: Factory functions for test data generation

nodes.label: sync.test.ts (integration)
nodes.description: Integration tests for dealer sync endpoints — trigger sync, status, bank-info CRUD, auth enforcement. Mocks BullMQ workers.
nodes.tooltip: Sync API integration tests — 5 test cases

nodes.label: internal-sync.test.ts (integration)
nodes.description: Integration tests for internal sync API — payload validation, auth rejection, quarantine invalid records, valid processing, idempotent upsert, stock allocation. Extensive inline migration setup.
nodes.tooltip: Internal sync API integration — 7 test cases

nodes.label: efps-sync-captcha.test.ts (unit)
nodes.description: Unit tests for eFPS sync worker module structure and processSyncPayload with valid/invalid beneficiary records. Full dependency mocking.
nodes.tooltip: Sync worker unit tests — module exports + payload processing

nodes.label: efps-sync-mappings.test.ts (unit)
nodes.description: Unit tests for sync pipeline processing — beneficiary, transaction, stock_allocation record types, mixed payloads, validation/quarantine, schema validation with Zod
nodes.tooltip: Sync pipeline unit tests — 8 test cases covering all record types

nodes.label: sync_quarantine
nodes.description: Table for quarantined invalid sync records (dealer_id, record_type, raw_data, errors, source, reviewed_at lifecycle)
nodes.tooltip: Quarantine table — referenced in internal-sync.test.ts setup

nodes.label: system_events
nodes.description: Table for system-level events logged during sync operations (event_type, severity, source, trace_id)
nodes.tooltip: System events table — referenced in internal-sync.test.ts setup

nodes.label: argon2
nodes.description: Argon2 password hashing library used in test-argon scripts, sync test setup, and factories.ts for hash verification
nodes.tooltip: Argon2id — dealer password hash

nodes.label: Playwright
nodes.description: Browser automation library used in scratch scripts (inspect-captcha, inspect-ipds, inspect-portal, inspect-post-login) for eFPS/IPDS portal crawling
nodes.tooltip: Playwright chromium — portal scraping

nodes.label: Tesseract.js
nodes.description: OCR library used in inspect-captcha and inspect-post-login for solving eFPS portal captcha images
nodes.tooltip: Tesseract.js — captcha solving

edges.label: reuses captcha technique with full login flow
